name: Griff Oberwald
skills: Block, Dodge, Fend, Loner (3+), Sprint, Sure Feet, Consummate Professional
fact: Has never lost a match while wearing his lucky cravat. It has never been washed.

name: Fert Chortlemann
fact: Once arm-wrestled an Ogre to a draw. The Ogre denies this.

name: Bradley Michael Fahrtz
fact: His family crest is just a picture of a boot. For reasons.

name: "Bread" Pudding
fact: Originally joined the team for the post-match buffet. Stayed for the violence.

name: Hot Dog O'Flanahan
fact: Runs faster when someone mentions a sale on sausages.

name: Gabriela Krumpton
fact: Can throw a spiral through a moving carriage wheel from 20 yards.

name: Vivian "Salty" Pretzler
fact: Adds salt to every meal. Including desserts.

name: Big Todd
fact: Not actually that big. The name is aspirational.

name: Spraynard Krieger
fact: Secretly believes the ball is a conspiracy.

name: Prance Dingle
fact: Prance is not a nickname. It is legally binding.

name: Fritz Churner
fact: Owns a butter churn. Brings it to away games.

name: "Cannon" Blotzum
fact: Once caught a ball while being thrown out of a tavern.

name: Chuck "Parabolic" Archer
fact: Math nerd who calculates optimal pass angles mid-play.
